title: Ukrainian Spiced Apple Tagine
description: A warm and aromatic stew originating from Ukraine, this tagine combines the sweetness of apples with the rich flavors of spices.

ingredients.name: apples
ingredients.notes: Granny Smith or other firm varieties

ingredients.name: tagine spice blend
ingredients.notes: Available at most Middle Eastern markets

instructions: Heat oil in a large Dutch oven over medium-high heat.
Add sausage and cook, breaking up with a spoon, until browned, about 5 minutes.
Add onion and cook, stirring occasionally, until softened, about 8 minutes.
Add tagine spice blend, cinnamon, nutmeg, salt, and pepper; cook, stirring constantly, for 1 minute.
Add apples and cook, stirring occasionally, until slightly tender, about 5 minutes.
Transfer pot to the oven and cook, covered, at 300°F (150°C) for 30 minutes.
Serve hot, garnished with fresh herbs, if desired.
